The Offering

Property Description

3800 SW 8th Street is a freestanding, income-producing corner retail building commanding the signalized intersection of US-41 (Calle Ocho / Tamiami Trail) and SW 38th Avenue — the gateway to Coral Gables on one of South Florida's highest-traffic commercial corridors.

Built in 1945 and meticulously maintained, the 3,259 SF building sits on a 6,000 SF corner lot with wrap-around frontage, prominent signage on two streets, dedicated parking, and all-day pedestrian and vehicle exposure. It is home to Caffe Italia, an established Italian restaurant on a triple-net (NNN) lease in place through July 2027 — worry-free income today, and a near-term opening to mark rent to market, re-tenant, or take occupancy as an owner-user.

Minutes from Miracle Mile, Little Havana, Brickell, and Miami International Airport, at the gateway to Coral Gables. The market has already spoken on this block: the building next door (3808 SW 8th St) sold in May 2026 at $765 per square foot.

Why This Deal

Investment Highlights

01
PROVEN PRICING — NEXT DOOR
3808 SW 8th St sold May 2026 for $8.8M at $765/SF. The suggested $767/SF here is validated on the same block, this quarter.
02
HARD-CORNER VISIBILITY
Signalized corner on US-41 (Calle Ocho) with wrap-around frontage, exceptional traffic counts, and all-day pedestrian exposure.
03
TRIPLE-NET INCOME IN PLACE
Triple-net income in place from an established restaurant tenant — expenses covered by the tenant, collect from day one.
04
LEASE MATURES JULY 2027
±$21.50/SF NNN in place — below market for signalized US-41 corner retail. Mark to market, re-tenant, or owner-occupy within a year.
05
TURN-KEY RESTAURANT BUILD-OUT
Fully equipped second-generation restaurant with kitchen infrastructure and signage — immediately attractive to owner-operators.
